lines: Use Left/Right to switch topics.
Use Up/Down to switch dimensions.
sections.title: What

fallback_topic.summary: No context-specific help topics were found.
fallback_topic.title: Help Overview

compact_lines: - BOTTOM BOUNDARY: active-piece guide on the bottom board boundary.
- HELPER: only lines intersecting active piece cells.
- ALL BOUNDARIES: active-piece guide on every board boundary.
- Locked-cell transparency affects board cells already on the board (including challenge layers and landed pieces).
full_lines: - BOTTOM BOUNDARY: active-piece guide on the bottom board boundary.
- HELPER: only lines intersecting active piece cells.
- ALL BOUNDARIES: active-piece guide on every board boundary.
- Applies to locked board cells only (challenge layers + landed pieces).
- Range is 0%-90%; default is 25% from Settings > Display.
- In-game adjust uses camera transparency keybinds (shown in side panel controls).
- 4D is shown as multiple 3D boards (one per W layer).

compact_lines: - Use Full Key Map topic for complete live key coverage.
- See Scoring topic for points and bonus rules.
full_lines: - Challenge mode prefills lower layers to raise early-game pressure.
- Exploration mode disables gravity/locking/clears for practice.
- Dry-run checks whether a selected setup can clear layers.

compact_lines: - Play 2D / Play 3D / Play 4D / Help / Leaderboard / Settings / Keybindings / Bot Options / Quit
- Pause menu keeps Help/Settings/Keybindings/Bot options parity.
full_lines: - Play 2D / Play 3D / Play 4D / Help / Leaderboard / Settings / Keybindings / Bot Options / Quit
- Rows show action, key(s), and action description.
- Pause includes Help, Leaderboard, Settings, Keybindings, Bot Options, Restart, and Quit.

compact_lines: - Left/Right switches topic. Up/Down switches dimension.
- [ or ] (also PgUp/PgDn) switches subpage when needed.
full_lines: - Left/Right switches topic. Up/Down switches dimension.
- [ or ] (also PgUp/PgDn) switches subpage when needed.

compact_lines: - Clear points scale with sqrt(layer_size/reference), floor=1.0 (reference: 10 cells).
- Final points = round((base + bonuses) * score multiplier).
- Multiplier reflects bot/grid/kick settings and speed level.
- Leaderboard ranks by score, then lines, then speed.
full_lines: - Larger layers award higher clear points using sqrt(layer_size/reference), floor=1.0.
- Multiplier reflects bot mode, grid mode, kick permissiveness, and speed level.
- Leaderboard stores standard-play game-over runs from 2D/3D/4D.
- It keeps the top 10 scores per dimension.
- Fields include score, cleared lines/layers, speed progression, and duration.

compact_lines: - Open Settings from the launcher or pause menu, then choose a category.
full_lines: - Settings now uses one shared page tree for Game, Display, Audio, direct Keyboard Bindings, and the Legacy entry.
- Game keeps Gameplay, Board / Geometry, Movement / Rotation, Endgame Effects, and Difficulty / Pace on one scrolling page.

compact_lines: - Re-open Keybindings Setup if controls feel inconsistent.
- Use explicit Save when you want a durable checkpoint.
- Use Edge/OFF grid if visuals feel crowded.
full_lines: - Re-open Keybindings Setup if controls feel inconsistent.
- Use explicit Save when you want a durable checkpoint.
- Use Edge/OFF grid if visuals feel crowded.

value_templates.settings_compact_overflow: - Open full-size window to view all category descriptions.

footer_hints.full: Esc/Q back | Left/Right topic | Up/Down dimension | [ ] subpage

lines: Open Topology Playground, switch to Editor, and set Tool to Edit.
Probe is inspection-only. Edit is the mutating seam workflow.
sections.title: Start Here

lines: Click a source boundary, then click a target boundary.
Adjust the permutation and tangent sign toggles in the transform editor.
Press Apply to commit the seam.
sections.title: Create

lines: Click a seam, or click one of its boundaries while Tool is Edit, to load that seam into the editor.
Change permutation or signs and press Apply to update it.
Press Remove only after the seam is selected.
sections.title: Edit Or Remove

lines: Use the helper panel to confirm Selected seam and Tool focus before applying changes.
If no seam is selected, Remove reports No active glue selected.
sections.title: Checks

hard_drop.description: Drop piece immediately to lock position.

move_down.description: Explorer mode: move active piece down along the gravity axis.

move_up.description: Explorer mode: move active piece up along the gravity axis.
move_up.label: Move up

move_w_neg.description: Move active piece to previous W-layer board.

move_w_pos.description: Move active piece to next W-layer board.

move_z_neg.description: Move active piece forward, away from the viewer in the default view.

move_z_pos.description: Move active piece backward, toward the viewer in the default view.

quit.description: Quit the current game or application flow.

payload.subtitle: Scene-first topology playground shell copy for live traversal, presets, sandbox play, and seam editing.
payload.title: Topology Playground

ui.text: Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.

ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.
ui.text: Soft-drop four times.

ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.
ui.text: Hard-drop once.

ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid six times: BOTTOM BOUNDARY, EDGE, FULL, HELPER, ALL BOUNDARIES, then OFF again.
ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.

ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.
ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.

ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.
ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.

ui.hint: Move and rotate the piece into the hole, then Hard Drop to clear exactly one line.
ui.text: remove one full line.

ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board.
ui.text: clear the full prepared board.

ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.
ui.text: place the piece into the highlighted target.
Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Move piece depth-away four times.
Move piece depth-closer four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ negative direction four times.

ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.
ui.text: Soft-drop four times.

ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.
ui.text: Hard-drop once.
Rotate camera yaw fine negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw positive four times.
Rotate camera yaw fine positive four times.
Rotate camera pitch negative four times.
Rotate camera pitch positive four times.

ui.hint: Hold Right Mouse Button and keep moving the mouse for at least 2 seconds.
ui.text: Rotate the board with the mouse.

ui.hint: Keep scrolling the Mouse Wheel for at least 2 seconds to zoom the board.
ui.text: Zoom the board with the mouse wheel.
Zoom in four times.
Zoom out four times.
Reset camera once.

ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.
ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.

ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.
ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.

ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid six times: BOTTOM BOUNDARY, EDGE, FULL, HELPER, ALL BOUNDARIES, then OFF again.
ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.

ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.
ui.text: place the piece into the highlighted target.

ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared gap, then Hard Drop to clear one full 3D layer.
ui.text: remove one full layer.

ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board.
ui.text: clear the full prepared board.

ui.hint: Press the Move Left control 4 times.
ui.text: Move the falling shape left four times.

ui.hint: Press the Move Right control 4 times.
ui.text: Move the falling shape right four times.

ui.hint: Press the Move Away control 4 times.
ui.text: Move the falling shape farther away four times.

ui.hint: Press the Move Closer control 4 times.
ui.text: Move the falling shape closer four times.
Move the falling shape to the previous W layer four times.
Move the falling shape to the next W layer four times.
Turn the falling shape in the flat XY plane four times.
Turn the falling shape in the flat XY plane the other way four times.
Turn the falling shape in the XZ plane four times.
Turn the falling shape in the XZ plane the other way four times.
Turn the falling shape in the YZ plane four times.
Turn the falling shape in the YZ plane the other way four times.

ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate XW + 4 times.
ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the XW plane four times.

ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate XW - 4 times.
ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the XW plane the other way four times.

ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate YW + 4 times.
ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the YW plane four times.

ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate YW - 4 times.
ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the YW plane the other way four times.

ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate ZW + 4 times.
ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the ZW plane four times.

ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate ZW - 4 times.
ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the ZW plane the other way four times.

ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for a controlled fall.
ui.text: Move the shape down slowly four times.

ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to place the shape immediately.
ui.text: Drop and lock the shape once.
Pan the camera a little to the left four times.
Pan the camera left four times.
Pan the camera right four times.
Pan the camera a little to the right four times.
Tilt the camera with Pitch - four times.
Tilt the camera with Pitch + four times.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with XW-.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with XW+.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with ZW-.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with ZW+.

ui.hint: Hold the right mouse button and keep moving the mouse for at least 2 seconds.
ui.text: Rotate the board with the mouse.

ui.hint: Keep scrolling the mouse wheel for at least 2 seconds.
ui.text: Zoom the board with the mouse wheel.

ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid six times: BOTTOM BOUNDARY, EDGE, FULL, HELPER, ALL BOUNDARIES, then OFF again.
ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
Zoom in four times.
Zoom out four times.

ui.hint: Press Reset View once to go back to the default angle.
ui.text: Reset the camera once.

ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.
ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to the minimum allowed value.

ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.
ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to the maximum allowed value.

ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then press Hard Drop to finish the target.
ui.text: Place the shape into the highlighted target.

ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared gap, then press Hard Drop to clear one full 4D hyper-layer.
ui.text: Clear one full hyper-layer.

ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then press Hard Drop to clear the whole board for a bonus.
ui.text: Clear the whole prepared board.

payload.description: Canonical segmented stage order for tutorial progression: translations, piece rotations, camera rotations, camera controls, and goals.

stages.objective: Move to previous W slice 4 times.
stages.title: Move W-

stages.objective: Move to next W slice 4 times.
stages.title: Move W+

stages.title: Mouse Orbit

stages.objective: Zoom camera with mouse wheel scrolling for at least 2 seconds.
stages.title: Mouse Zoom

stages.objective: Cycle through the guide grid display modes.
stages.title: Toggle Grid

stages.objective: Place the piece into the highlighted target.
stages.title: Target Placement

stages.objective: Clear the prepared 2-layer board with one piece.
stages.title: Full Board Clear

stages.objective: Place the piece into the highlighted target.
stages.title: Target Placement

payload.title: Interactive Tutorial Stage Plan
